results.title: Exxon Mobil Soars: XOM Stock Nears Record Highs in April 2026
Exxon (XOM) Says Mideast Conflict Cut 6% of Global Output in First Quarter - Bloomberg
What To Expect From ExxonMobil's (XOM) Q1 Earnings
ExxonMobil's latest move shows a shift by the global oil giant - TheStreet
ExxonMobil Rose 11% in March. Here's Where XOM Could Go in 2026

results.summary: XOM last traded ~$154.33 (Apr 29). Mideast conflict cut ~6% of global output in Q1. Golden Pass LNG Train 1 first export cargo left Sabine Pass Apr 22 — but Exxon withdrew offer to sell two initial cargoes while plant still commissioning at ~1/3 capacity. Hong Kong fuel station network sale talks (~$500-600M deal). Q1 2026 earnings due May 1 before market open; analysts expect ~39% EPS decline YoY. Stock rose 11% in March on energy sector tailwinds.
